                                    Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks Perform 
dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring accuracy, 
repeatability, and compliance with quality standards. Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, 
Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments (Calypso, Quindos). Define, optimize, and standardize measurement 
programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO GPS standards. Analyze measurement results, 
support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R\&D to ensure robust inspection processes. 
Manage and continuously improve inspection\-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, 
contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup. Your profile Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent 
background. At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD\&T 
certification is a plus. Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement 
standards. Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills. Fluent in Italian; 
English B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and 
innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold 
making and the production of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career 
opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent 
management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide 
development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. 
Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable 
future together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision 
components and tools manufacturers and the mold\-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, 
laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, 
tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the 
brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, 
Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Your contact Mollar HR Business Partner 
\+41 91 806 90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Apply now jid2172a04jm

documentation and software specifications throughout the development lifecycle. Support fast prototyping activities and 
contribute to sprint planning in collaboration with the Software Component Owners. Your profile Bachelor's or Master’s 
degree in Automation Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Electronic Engineering. At least 1 year of experience in PLC 
and/or real\-time software development (e.g., C, C\+\+, Structured Text). Experience with simulation and modeling tools 
(e.g., Matlab/Simulink). Basic knowledge of analog and digital electronics. Experience in the machine tools industry 
and ISO programming is a plus. Fluent in Italian. English level B2 or higher. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM 
(Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and

experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years. Strong background in Object\-Oriented architecture, 
UML, and OO programming (C\# / .NET); experience in HMI development (WPF / XAML). Good understanding of the full 
software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Structured, autonomous, and 
collaborative working style; customer\-oriented and resilient under pressure. Fluent in English and Italian. AGIE

                                    Software Engineer Expert \- R\&D Software Engineer Expert – R\&D Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited 
Your tasks Develop and maintain HMI software aligned with EDM machine requirements and user experience standards. 
Comfortable handling complex mathematical and algorithmic challenges, particularly in analytical 3D geometry — a core 
requirement for geometric processing in EDM software. Interface with Real\-Time \& PLC teams to define, validate, and 
improve new functionalities. Ensure software quality through testing, documentation, and structured code reviews. 
Participate in technical workshops, cross\-team validations, and support knowledge\-sharing across engineering teams. 
Your profile Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent technical field. Proven 
experience in industrial software environments, at least 3 years. Strong background in Object\-Oriented architecture, 
UML, and OO programming (C\# / .NET); experience in HMI development (WPF / XAML). Good understanding of the full 
software development lifecycle, quality assurance, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Structured, autonomous, and 
collaborative working style; customer\-oriented and resilient under pressure. Fluent in English and Italian. AGIE 
CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in 
wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production 
of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED 
MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process 
(MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development 
opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability 
and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future 
together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and 
tools manufacturers and the mold\-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser 
micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, 
and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE 
CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, 
and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Your contact Mollar HR Business Partner \+41 91 806 
90 30 Web E\-Mail Agie Charmilles SA, Losone Via Zandone 1 6616 Losone Schweiz Apply now jid8a0b1b6jm jit0519jm jiy26jm

descriptions.fr: AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone Temporaire: Non Taux d'activité: 100% CH-6616 Losone Langue: fr Annonce originale / Postuler Page d'accueil Ingénieur Électronique – R&D Taux d'activité: 100% Lieu: Losone Type de contrat: CDI Vos missions Concevoir, développer, tester et maintenir des électroniques de puissance, analogiques et numériques pour les plateformes matérielles actuelles et de nouvelle génération de générateurs pour machines d’EDM (électroérosion). Acquérir et développer des connaissances en contrôle de processus sur les machines EDM, y compris le dépannage et l’analyse des processus, en contribuant à la résolution de cas clients/terrain et en collaborant étroitement avec les équipes de développement applicatif. Soutenir l’homologation des composants, la gestion des bases de données et les activités d’achat pour de nouveaux composants et sources alternatives. Collaborer avec les équipes de production dans le développement de systèmes de test et les activités de présérie. Contribuer au respect des normes pertinentes tout au long du cycle de développement du matériel. Votre profil Master en génie électronique. Expérience avérée, d’au moins 2 ans, en conception d’électronique analogique, de puissance et numérique ; connaissance de VHDL et d’outils de simulation électronique. Familiarité avec les équipements de mesure (multimètres, oscilloscopes) et les langages de programmation (C, C++, C#). Connaissance de Matlab/Simulink ; la FMEA et les processus qualité sont un atout. Approche méthodique et rigoureuse, forte orientation d’équipe et réelle motivation pour l’amélioration continue. Italien courant ; l’anglais technique (oral et écrit) est requis. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur de l’EDM (électroérosion), est reconnue comme une marque premium et un leader de l’innovation dans les domaines de l’EDM à fil, à plongée et pour le perçage. Ses solutions prêtes pour l’automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant précision suisse, fiabilité et performance. De belles opportunités de carrière : UNITED MACHINING propose de nombreuses possibilités d’évolution professionnelle. Nous offrons également un processus dédié de gestion des talents (MyNextBigStep) pour accélérer votre carrière. Nous mettons à disposition des outils d’apprentissage globaux ainsi que des formations et des cours spécialisés. Engagement en faveur de la durabilité et de l’innovation : Nous avons des objectifs ambitieux en matière de durabilité et d’innovation. Travaillons ensemble pour un avenir durable. UNITED MACHINING est l’un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les fabricants de composants et d’outils de précision ainsi que pour l’industrie de la fabrication de moules. Le portefeuille comprend des fraiseuses, des machines EDM, le texturage laser, l’usinage laser de précision et la fabrication additive. En outre, la division propose des broches, de l’automatisation, des outils et des solutions numérisées, soutenues par un service client et un support inégalés. UNITED MACHINING regroupe les marques AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, STEP TEC et SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING est basé à Bienne, en Suisse, et emploie actuellement plus de 3 000 collaborateurs dans plus de 50 sites à travers le monde. descriptions.fr: Technicien en Métrologie 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Technicien en Métrologie 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone Temporaire : Non Taux d'occupation : 100% CH-6616 Losone Langue : FR Annonce originale / Postuler Page d'accueil Vos missions Effectuez des mesures dimensionnelles et fonctionnelles principalement dans le domaine de l'inspection et des tests finaux, en garantissant la précision, la répétabilité et le respect des normes de qualité. Réalisez des mesures à l'aide de systèmes de métrologie avancés (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) et des environnements logiciels associés (Calypso, Quindos). Définissez, optimisez et standardisez les programmes de mesure et les méthodes d'inspection conformément à la méthodologie AUKOM et aux normes ISO GPS. Analysez les résultats des mesures, soutenez l'analyse des causes racines et collaborez avec la Qualité, la Production et la R&D pour garantir des processus d'inspection robustes. Gérez et améliorez en continu les processus de mesure liés à l'inspection, la documentation et les activités d'étalonnage, contribuant ainsi à l'évolution de la configuration métrologique. Votre profil Diplôme technique en mécanique ou formation équivalente. Au moins 3 ans d'expérience dans un laboratoire de métrologie ou un environnement de mesure qualité. La certification AUKOM GD&T est un atout. Connaissances approfondies des processus de mesure dimensionnelle, des systèmes d'étalonnage et des normes de mesure. Analytique, organisé et autonome, avec de solides compétences en collaboration et en coordination. Italien langue maternelle ; anglais niveau B1. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventeur de l'EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), est reconnue comme une marque premium et un leader de l'innovation dans les domaines de l'électroérosion à fil, à plongeon et de perçage. Ses solutions prêtes pour l'automatisation sont utilisées dans la fabrication de moules et la production de composants haut de gamme, offrant précision suisse, fiabilité et performance. descriptions.it: Metrology Technician 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Metrology Technician 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% CH-6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Tipo di lavoro: Unlimited Eseguire misurazioni dimensionali e funzionali principalmente all'interno dell'area di ispezione e test finale, garantendo precisione, ripetibilità e conformità agli standard di qualità. Eseguire misurazioni utilizzando sistemi di metrologia avanzati (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) e relativi ambienti software (Calypso, Quindos). Definire, ottimizzare e standardizzare i programmi di misura e i metodi di ispezione in linea con la metodologia AUKOM e gli standard GPS ISO. Analizza i risultati delle misurazioni, supporta l'analisi delle cause root e collabora con Quality, Production e R\&D per garantire processi di ispezione robusti. Gestire e migliorare continuamente i processi di misura, la documentazione e le attività di calibrazione relativi all'ispezione, contribuendo all'evoluzione della configurazione della metrologia. Il tuo profilo Grado tecnico in background meccanico o equivalente. Almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un laboratorio di metrologia o in un ambiente di misura di qualità. La certificazione AUKOM GD\&T è un plus. Forte conoscenza dei processi di misura dimensionale, dei sistemi di calibrazione e degli standard di misura. Analitico, organizzato e autonomo, con forti capacità di collaborazione e coordinamento. Fluente in italiano; l'inglese B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventore di EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), è conosciuto come un marchio premium e leader di innovazione in filo, die\-sinking, e hole\-drilling EDM. Le sue soluzioni di automazione\-ready sono utilizzate nella produzione di stampi e nella produzione di componenti di fascia alta, offrendo precisione, affidabilità e prestazioni svizzere. Grandi opportunità di carriera: UNITED MACHINING offre molte opportunità per quanto riguarda la crescita della carriera. Offriamo anche un processo di gestione del talento dedicato (MyNextBigStep) per aumentare la vostra carriera. Strumenti di apprendimento eccellenti: A UNITED MACHINING forniamo opportunità di sviluppo per tutti. Offriamo strumenti di apprendimento globali, nonché corsi di formazione e corsi specializzati. Sostenibilità e innovazione: abbiamo obiettivi di alta sostenibilità e innovazione. Lavoriamo insieme per un futuro sostenibile. UNITED MACHINING è uno dei principali fornitori mondiali di soluzioni complete per i produttori di componenti e utensili di precisione e l'industria dello stampaggio. Il portafoglio comprende fresatura, EDM, texturing laser, micromachining laser e macchine di produzione additive. Inoltre, la divisione offre mandrini, automazione, utensili e soluzioni digitalizzate supportate da servizi e supporto clienti senza rivali. UNITED MACHINING comprende i marchi AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC e SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING ha sede a Biel, in Svizzera, e attualmente conta oltre 3'000 dipendenti su oltre 50 siti in tutto il mondo. descriptions.en: Metrology Technician 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Metrology Technician 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-6616 Losone None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 100% CH-6616 Losone Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Metrology Technician Metrology Technician Workload: 100% Location: Losone Job type: Unlimited Your tasks Perform dimensional and functional measurements mainly within the inspection and final testing area, ensuring accuracy, repeatability, and compliance with quality standards. Execute measurements using advanced metrology systems (Zeiss, Leitz, Werth, Mahr) and related software environments (Calypso, Quindos). Define, optimize, and standardize measurement programs and inspection methods in line with AUKOM methodology and ISO GPS standards. Analyze measurement results, support root cause analysis, and collaborate with Quality, Production, and R\&D to ensure robust inspection processes. Manage and continuously improve inspection\-related measurement processes, documentation, and calibration activities, contributing to the evolution of the metrology setup. Your profile Technical degree in Mechanical, or equivalent background. At least 3 years of experience in a metrology laboratory or quality measurement environment. AUKOM GD\&T certification is a plus. Strong knowledge of dimensional measurement processes, calibration systems, and measurement standards. Analytical, organized, and autonomous, with strong collaboration and coordination skills. Fluent in Italian; English B1\. AGIE CHARMILLES, inventor of EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), is known as a premium brand and innovation leader in wire, die\-sinking, and hole\-drilling EDM. Its automation\-ready solutions are used in mold making and the production of high\-end components, offering Swiss precision, reliability, and performance. Great career opportunities: UNITED MACHINING provides many opportunities regarding career growth. We also offer a dedicated talent management process (MyNextBigStep) to boost your career. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold\-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Analytisch, organisiert und autonom, mit starker Zusammenarbeit und Koordinationsfähigkeit. Fluent auf Italienisch; Englisch B1\. Excellent learning tools: At UNITED MACHINING we provide development opportunities for everyone. We offer global learning tools as well as trainings and specialized courses. Sustainability and innovation focus: We have high sustainability and innovation goals. Let's work towards a sustainable future together. About us UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, , STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. Learn more... descriptions.it: Automatiker EFZ 80-100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Automatiker EFZ 80-100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-2504 Biel/Bienne None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 80 - 100% CH-2504 Biel/Bienne Lingua:de Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Automatiker EFZ (w/m/d) Automatiker EFZ (w/m/d) Pensum: 80\-100% Arbeitsort: Biel Anstellungsart: Unbefristet Ihre Aufgaben Sie werden als Profi im Bereich Verdrahtung und/oder Inbetriebnahme unserer komplexen 3\- und 5\-Achs Hochgeschwindigkeits\-Fräsmaschinen eingesetzt. Dafür steht Ihnen eine moderne Infrastruktur zur Verfügung. Hier können Sie Ihre fachlichen Fähigkeiten weiterentwickeln. Sie sind verantwortlich für die termingerechte Inbetriebnahme der CNC\- Maschinen (Sinumerik oder Heidenhain) und deren Peripheriegeräte unter Einhaltung der Qualitätsrichtlinien. Ausserdem verantworten Sie die Wartung der Betriebsmittel und Einrichtungen in Ihrem Bereich. Ihr Profil Sie verfügen über eine abgeschlossene elektrische Grundbildung (EFZ), idealerweise zum Automatiker, Automatikmonteur, Elektromechaniker, Elektroniker oder Elektriker mit Elektronik\-/Informatikerfahrung. Von Vorteil bringen Sie bereits Erfahrung im Maschinen\- und Apparatebau mit. Lösungsorientiertes Denken, technisches Flair und ausgeprägte Diagnosefähigkeiten gehören zu ihren Stärken. Sie weisen sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse aus, Englisch ist von Vorteil. Ein hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein zeichnet Sie aus und Sie sind gewohnt, selbständig und exakt zu arbeiten. Es macht Ihnen Freude, Verantwortung zu übernehmen und Sie wollen sich stetig weiterentwickeln. In unserem internationalen Konzern stehen Ihnen spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten offen. MIKRON MILL ist einer der weltweiten Experten für vertikales Fräsen und Erfinder des Hochgeschwindigkeitsfräsens. Die automatisierungsfähigen Maschinen sind bekannt für dynamische Präzision und Freiformgenauigkeit und liefern Spitzenleistungen bei komplexen Anwendungen. Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam auf eine nachhaltige Zukunft hinarbeiten. Das Portfolio umfasst Maschinen für das Fräsen, die Funkenerosion, die Laserstrukturierung, die Lasermikrobearbeitung und die additive Fertigung. Darüber hinaus bietet der Geschäftsbereich Spindeln, Automatisierungslösungen, Werkzeuge und digitalisierte Lösungen, die durch einen unübertroffenen Kundenservice und Support unterstützt werden. descriptions.it: Service Engineer Laser 80-100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). ## Service Engineer Laser 80-100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-2500 Biel/Bienne None Angestellte (Schweiz) None Angestellte (global) Temporaneo: No Carico di lavoro: 80 - 100% CH-2500 Biel/Bienne Lingua:en Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage **Service Engineer Laser** ** • Your tasks** * Installation, commissioning, maintenance, and repair of laser texturing and cutting machines * Execution of retrofits, upgrades, and machine conversions * Identification and implementation of optimization opportunities in close collaboration with Development and 2nd Level Support * Professional handling, troubleshooting, analysis, and documentation of service cases * Support in creating, reviewing, and improving technical documentation and process procedures * Occasional assistance with trade fair setup and dismantling activities * Ensuring full compliance with Advanced Manufacturing safety standards, including particle emissions, laser radiation, contamination control, gas handling, and explosion prevention * Participation in additional functional responsibilities based on expertise and business requirements (e.g., internal training, quality initiatives, or special technical projects --- approximately 10% of working time) ** • Your profile** * Completed technical vocational training, ideally with an additional qualification as a certified technician * Several years of experience as a Service Technician for laser machines or comparable high-tech industrial equipment * Strong customer-service orientation combined with an independent and structured work approach * High willingness to travel (up to 90%) across Europe and Switzerland * Good MS Office skills and strong IT knowledge in hardware and software environments * Fluent English skills are mandatory, along with fluent German or French * High commitment to providing excellent customer support and service quality * Reliable, responsible, and team-oriented personality * Strong communication skills with a customer-focused mindset * Independent, solution-oriented, goal-driven, and organized way of working **About us** UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. UNITED MACHINING is headquartered in Biel, Switzerland, and currently has over 3'000 employees on over 50 sites worldwide. **Your contact** Chiara Milan Personnel Specialist +41 79 101 51 75 chiara.milan@georgfischer.com **Location** United Machining Sales Switzerland SA Biel / Geneva Switzerland Indietro

high-tech industrial equipment * Strong customer-service orientation combined with an independent and structured work approach * High willingness to travel (up to 90%) across Europe and Switzerland * Good MS Office skills and strong IT knowledge in hardware and software environments * Fluent English skills are mandatory, along with fluent German or French * High commitment to providing excellent customer support and service quality * Reliable, responsible, and team-oriented personality * Strong communication skills with a customer-focused mindset * Independent, solution-oriented, goal-driven, and organized way of working **About us** UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. UNITED MACHINING is one of the world's leading providers of complete solutions for precision components and tools manufacturers and the mold-making industry. The portfolio includes milling, EDM, laser texturing, laser micromachining, and additive manufacturing machines. Additionally, the division offers spindles, automation, tooling, and digitalized solutions backed by unrivaled customer services and support. UNITED MACHINING includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. Vous êtes le contact technique central pour nos sociétés commerciales et les soutenir dans le support de deuxième niveau avec des problèmes techniques complexes. - Vous recevez les réclamations de nos techniciens de service, les traitez de manière structurée et coordonnez les cas de service par téléphone, e-mail et système de ticketing. - Vous développez des solutions techniques durables, les communiquez au support de premier niveau de manière orientée solution et garantissez une qualité de service élevée. - Vous collectez, analysez et évaluez les cas problématiques récurrents, identifiez les erreurs systématiques et favorisez activement l'amélioration continue de la qualité. - Vous agissez en tant qu'interface avec le support de troisième niveau (fabricant), gérez les contrôles des machines sous Windows et créez la documentation de service et les documents pour les réunions de coordination. • Votre profil - Vous avez suivi une formation technique de base et combinez des connaissances techniques avec une forte affinité pour les sujets commerciaux et organisationnels. - Vous disposez d'au moins deux ans d'expérience dans un rôle comparable en génie mécanique. - Des termes tels que fraisage, électrotechnique, hydraulique, pneumatique et programmation d'automates font partie de votre vie professionnelle quotidienne et suscitent votre intérêt technique. - Vous travaillez en toute confiance avec des systèmes basés sur Windows et disposez de solides connaissances informatiques pour gérer les commandes de machines et les outils de billetterie. - Vous communiquez de manière claire et orientée vers les solutions et possédez une très bonne connaissance de l'allemand ainsi qu'une bonne connaissance du français et de l'anglais, tant parlé qu'écrit. - Vous êtes prêt à voyager environ 20%. MIKRON MILL est l'un des experts mondiaux en matière de fraisage vertical et l'inventeur du fraisage à grande vitesse. Les machines prêtes à l'automatisation sont connues pour leur précision dynamique et leur précision de forme libre, offrant des performances optimales dans les applications complexes. MIKRON MILL est synonyme d'innovation, d'agilité et de valeur ajoutée durable. Mettre l'accent sur la durabilité et l'innovation : nous avons des objectifs élevés en matière de durabilité et d'innovation. Travaillons ensemble pour un avenir durable. À propos de nous UNITED MACHINING est l'un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux de solutions complètes pour les fabricants de composants et d'outils de précision ainsi que pour la fabrication de moules. Le portefeuille comprend des machines pour le fraisage, l'électroérosion, la structuration laser, le micro-usinage laser et la fabrication additive. MIKRON MILL ist einer der weltweiten Experten für vertikales Fräsen und Erfinder des Hochgeschwindigkeitsfräsens. descriptions.it: Tecnico diagnostico 100% — AGIE Charmilles SA (GF Machining Solutions), Biel/Bienne (TI). tecnico diagnostico 100% AGIE Charmilles SA AGIE Charmilles SA, CH-2501 Biel/Bienne Nessun dipendente (Svizzera) Nessun dipendente (globale) Temporaneo: No. Carico di lavoro: 100 % CH-2501 Biel/Bienne Lingua: de Inserzione originale / Candidarsi Homepage Ingegnere diagnostico (m/d) Ingegnere diagnostico (w/m/d) Pensum: 100% Luogo di lavoro: Biel Essi sono il contatto tecnico centrale per le nostre aziende di vendita e li sostengono nel supporto di secondo livello in complesse questioni tecniche. Ricevono reclami dai nostri tecnici del servizio, li preparano strutturalmente e coordinano i casi di servizio tramite telefono, e-mail e ticketing. Sviluppano soluzioni tecniche sostenibili, comunicano queste soluzioni al supporto di First Level e garantiscono un'elevata qualità dei servizi. Essi raccolgono, analizzano e valutano i problemi ricorrenti, identificano errori sistematici e promuovono attivamente il miglioramento continuo della qualità. Agisci come interfaccia per il supporto di terzo livello (produttore), mantieni i controlli delle macchine basati su Windows e crei la documentazione di servizio e la documentazione per le riunioni di coordinamento. They develop sustainable technical solutions, communicate these solutions to the First Level support and ensure high service quality. You act as an interface to Third Level Support (manufacturer), maintain Windows\-based machine controls and create service documentation as well as documentation for coordination meetings. • Your profile You have completed basic technical training and combine technical understanding with a pronounced affinity for commercial and organizational issues. They bring at least two years of experience in a comparable function in mechanical engineering. Terms such as milling, electrical engineering, hydraulics, pneumatics and PLC\ programming are part of your everyday professional life and awaken your technical interest. They work safely with Windows\-based systems and bring solid knowledge of computer science to use machine controls and ticketing\ tools. They communicate clearly and solution-oriented and have very good knowledge of German as well as good knowledge of English and German in word and writing. They are ready to travel within around 20%. MIKRON MILL is one of the world's experts for vertical milling and high-speed milling. The automation-capable machines are known for dynamic precision and free-form accuracy and deliver excellence in complex applications.
